summary:
PROPHETIC ACCELERATION AND THE RED HEIFER: Brandon shares a message he received regarding a rapid acceleration of end-time events starting at Passover, specifically concerning the Jewish people rather than the church. Brandon mentions listening to Paul Begley discuss preparations for sacrificing a red heifer, noting that rabbis have constructed a ramp and an altar for this purpose. Brandon recounts that this sacrifice has only occurred nine times in history and has not been performed in over two millennia. Furthermore, Brandon refers to an 800-year-old prophecy from a rabbi predicting that the Messiah will arrive in the same year the next red heifer is sacrificed. According to Brandon, this impending sacrifice serves as a dedication to initiate the construction of the Third Temple, which connects to a previous vision where Brandon witnessed the Antichrist speaking to people from that very temple. Brandon also highlights the timing of these events aligning with an upcoming solar eclipse crossing America on April 8th.

VISIONS OF BETRAYAL AND THE AWAKENING OF THE CHURCH: Brandon recounts receiving a warning about an event termed the "Great Betrayal," wherein the United States will allegedly turn its back on Israel, consequently opening America up to an attack. In an accompanying vision, Brandon witnessed a red dragon crossing the sky from the west to strike America. Shifting focus to the spiritual state of the nation, Brandon describes another vision featuring a black-painted church with golden bells covered in gold dust. Brandon explains that the ringing of these bells signifies a final call to awaken the slumbering Body of Christ before the onset of the Great Tribulation, drawing a parallel to the days of Noah. Brandon emphasizes that this represents the last call for grace and calls for a massive harvest of souls as the door closes.

INTERCESSORY PRAYER AND PETITIONS FOR DELIVERANCE: Brandon engages in intercessory prayer, continuing a session that previously paused after a prophecy from Brother Hagin delivered by Pastor George regarding a coming wave and a glorious outpouring. Brandon specifically prays for the peace of Jerusalem, wisdom for Benjamin Netanyahu, and divine protection over Israel. Additionally, Brandon issues decrees for physical healing from conditions such as cancer and diabetes, the restoration of marriages and families, and freedom from drug addictions. Brandon also prays for the healing of his daughter's cough and requests supernatural financial blessings and wealth transfers to assist individuals with their bills. Brandon concludes the intercessory focus by proclaiming a supernatural occurrence expected for Palm Sunday and Passover.
rawData: [March 22, 2024]-[Pray with me for 1 hour - the rabbis are building the altar for the sacrifice of the red heifer]-[https://youtu.be/hbyGnC7qt4I]-[Good morning, family. I'm going to do another reactionary prayer video, "Pray With Me," to motivate you to pray. I created these—and I've said it several times now—to help motivate people to pray. I know sometimes it's hard to jump into the rivers by yourself, and it's easier to jump in with a lot of people. I created these videos on my "Pray With Me" channel, and I really believe they're helping people get excited about intercessory prayer. In these last days, whether you're praying as a group, on the way to work, or on the way home, it is your own private time. I just want to encourage you all to pray with me. These are exciting times. The Lord told me to do this, so I'm being obedient to what He has asked me to do. Hopefully, this will motivate you to jump into the rivers with me. I didn't finish the last video; I stopped in the middle right after Pastor George gave that prophecy from Brother Hagin about going into the ocean and the wave coming. I'm believing God for the manifestation of the glorious outpouring. That's what I'm standing for, and I want to tell you something I found exciting last night during my prayer time. The Lord told me again to listen to Paul Begley's channel. He was talking about the red heifer again. I only listened to a bit of it, but it was what the Holy Spirit wanted me to hear because it was confirmation for what the Lord had shown me about Passover. Whenever the Lord spoke to me, He said, "Brandon, this isn't about the church; this is about the Jews." He spoke to me about the acceleration that was about to take place starting at Passover. He said a great acceleration was going to take place. After I listened to Paul Begley, he was talking about how the rabbis built a ramp with an altar on it to sacrifice the red heifer. It was on one of the major networks in America talking about how they were going to do this. He even mentioned that sacrificing this red heifer has not been done for over 2,000 years; they've only done it nine times prior to that. He said that when this happens, it will be just like the time of Jesus. What's so amazing to me is the timing of everything: the acceleration of all these events, the eclipse that is about to come across America in the next couple of days, and the sacrifice of the red heifer potentially at Passover. Look at how fast it's going! He also said there was a rabbi who prophesied 800 years ago that when they sacrifice the next red heifer, we would see the Messiah come that year. This was a prophecy given 800 years ago about sacrificing the red heifer; this would be the 10th red heifer about to be sacrificed. It's going to be the dedication to start the Third Temple—the one I told you about where, when I went to the Tribulation, I saw the Antichrist on that temple talking to the people. It's all coming to pass so quickly. I was just so excited when I heard about the 2,000 years and the 800-year-old prophecy on Paul Begley's channel. He's doing a conference about the end times and the significance of the eclipse on April 8th. I just want to encourage you all: Jesus is coming! As a group, we pray and intercede for the signs of the times and all the things the Lord is wanting to do. We're helping cultivate the soil and priming the pump for what's happening in the spirit realm. When we're doing this, push in hard and let's go into the deep rivers. We're going to finish off this prayer video together. We take up Israel now. Thank you, Lord, for the peace of Jerusalem. We call for wisdom over Benjamin Netanyahu and divine protection over Israel. We lift up kingdom operations over the innocent people. When I'm praying, I see the Lord warning me about the "Great Betrayal" concerning the United States turning its back on Israel and not supporting them. This opens up an attack. I saw a red dragon come across the sky from the west and strike America. This is part of the demonic assignment sent to try to destroy America, but I know we can stop things through prayer. I thank You for angelic assistance from heaven for the nations. Lord, in Your mercy, You're moving people out of harm's way, just as You moved Lot and his wife out. You're moving them out of judgment's path. I pray over America now. We lift up America; you shall be saved and turned around. We call for repentance over the wicked and the prideful. Let the church bells ring for His purpose. I saw a steeple with golden church bells, but the paint on the church was black. The bells were ringing with the glory—like gold dust all over them as they rang. The bells are to awaken the slumbering Body of Christ. It's time to wake up, for the King is coming. This is the last call. As in the days of Noah, he yelled that last call for anyone to come into the Ark before the door closes. This is the last call for grace before the Great Tribulation. The bells are ringing in the church; the church is sleeping, and Jesus is going to wake up the church. Father, I thank You for the outpouring and a massive harvest of souls. We ask for one last push for the church bells to ring and wake everybody out of their slumber, especially across America. Shake the nations, Father, so there would be one last push. The door is closing. Jesus is coming. I call healing over your bodies right now. I call deliverance from cancers or diabetes. I call for restoration for marriages and children. I command drug addictions to be free in the name of Jesus. I pray for healing over my daughter's cough—no more allergies. We call finances in for each individual believing for money today. We thank You for angels that bring our money and for a supernatural wealth transfer to pay our bills. All things are possible to him who believes. I pray for a supernatural blessing over your households for Palm Sunday. Something supernatural is about to take place with Israel and Passover. I have to write all this down and keep praying. I'll do more prayer videos in the days ahead. Thank you for watching. God bless you all. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you. Click the notification bell, like, and subscribe. Have a wonderful day.]
